parameter.name: HPS_HANDOFF_OPTION_STRING
parameter.value: HPS_PRESENT: true HPS_DDR_PRESENT: false hps_wachdog_expiration: COLD_RESET cores_power_state: 15 boot_core: 0 l3_cache_size: HALF_ON f2soc_intfcsel: DISABLE f2sdram_intfcsel: DISABLE

parameter.name: HPS_HANDOFF_STRING
NOC_clk_outputs
parameter.value: NOC,L4 Free,L4 Peripheral,L4 Slow Peripheral,SoftPHY,CoreSight,CoreSight Debug APB,CoreSight Trace IO

parameter.name: HPS_HANDOFF_OPTION_STRING
parameter.value: HPS_PRESENT: true HPS_DDR_PRESENT: false hps_wachdog_expiration: COLD_RESET cores_power_state: 15 boot_core: 0 l3_cache_size: HALF_ON f2soc_intfcsel: DISABLE f2sdram_intfcsel: DISABLE

NOC_clk_outputs
